headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on W.W. Grainger, Raises Price Target to $1171
summary: Barclays  analyst Guy Hardwick   maintains W.W. Grainger (NYSE:GWW) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $1047 to $1171.

raw.headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on W.W. Grainger, Raises Price Target to $1171
raw.summary: Barclays  analyst Guy Hardwick   maintains W.W. Grainger (NYSE:GWW) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $1047 to $1171.

headline: GWW Q1 Deep Dive: Strong Revenue Growth and Margin Expansion Amid Tariff Headwinds
summary: Maintenance and repair supplier W.W. Grainger (NYSE:GWW) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 10.1% year on year to $4.74 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $19.4 billion at the midpoint came in 2.4% above analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $11.65 per share was 15% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
